text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's drizzling today. I decide to stop by the
training track, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's a new record for my top speed duration.
Next up...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there! You're still training in this weather?
It looks like it's about to pour.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And? What's it got to do with you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Guarded as ever. I was just worried it'd impact
your condition, what with a race on the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Like I'd buy that excuse. You're only here out
of "scientific curiosity".

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna pack up 'cause of some rain, go right
ahead. You're in the way.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Strict as ever too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it's slippery. I need to recheck my
footwork.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I should probably start my last spurt on the early
side...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I agree! Ultimately, it'll come down to what
you reach first: the goal, or your stamina's limit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That said, perhaps you'd sooner break your limits
than give into them. Just think what revelations
you could find in the heat of a race!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...The projected numbers are all within the
expected range. It's just a matter of letting my
body catch up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see you're still putting all your faith in numbers. I
would warn you, though—your body won't always
perform like you expect it to.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But if you absolutely want to improve fast, I've
got just the thing. Take this special Tachyon
brand—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
ARGH! Stop backseating already! Weren't you
gonna go home?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And leave my dear friend in the rain? I couldn't
possibly! Surely, a logically-inclined individual
like you has a method to this madness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast indicates clear skies for the
next few days. Would it not be more rational to
wait?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Sorry, but I don't care what numbers
they've got on the news. I only trust my own data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? And what's that data say? That it'll rain on
the big day? That you should tough it out in the
mud for good luck?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Butt out. My logic is absolute. That's why I'm
eliminating the possibility of any deviation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well now! You're convinced of your conclusion
without testing! What passion... or should I say
fanaticism?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though I suppose a scientist has to take a few
hypotheses for granted, or you'd never get
anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not an idealist like you. I'm not doing this out
of any love for science. All I care about is
winning.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Is realism not an ideal itself? How many
variables can one cherry-pick before they
become idealistic?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Look, just LEAVE already! Or do you want me to leak all your reports?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My, how scary! It would be a problem if someone
saw my top-secret research. Guess it's time for me
to take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and one last thing... Don't worry about
recording your physical data. I'd be more than
happy to measure everything for you. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, I don't remember asking. I know myself
better than anyone, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's out of the way, back to testing. I
have to calculate how much force to put in my
steps, and then...
